title: Roasted American Broccoli Skillet
description: A garlicky and crisp lazy-sunday American dish featuring broccoli, with a yuzu-cure and satvik-friendly ingredients, perfect for a relaxing meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, garlic, yuzu juice, salt, and black pepper.
Add the broccoli florets to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Transfer the broccoli to a large skillet and roast in the preheated oven for 15 minutes.
Remove the skillet from the oven and stir in lemon juice and grated ginger.
Return the skillet to the oven and continue roasting for an additional 5 minutes, or until the broccoli is tender and slightly browned.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
